DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF WILLIAM MURRAY'S MOTION TO COMPEL ATTENDANCE AT DEPOSITION AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED BY DEFENDANT TO THIS MOTION NOR TO THE NOTICE OF DEPOSITION AND THE MOVING PAPERS ESTABLISH GOOD CAUSE. ACCORDINGLY, THE COURT ORDERS DEPONENT TO APPEAR AND PRODUCE THE DOCUMENTS CALLED FOR BY THE SUBPOENA OF MARCH 14, 2019. ORDER IS SIGNED. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Attendance At Deposition And Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Aug-17-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Lawrence D. Murray, Murray & Associates, appering for Plaintiff William Murray, Telephone (415)673-0555;
No other appearance.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WILLIAM MURRAY'S Motion To Compel Attendance At Deposition And Production Of Documents.

NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED BY DEFENDANT TO THIS MOTION NOR TO THE NOTICE OF DEPOSITION AND THE MOVING PAPERS ESTABLISH GOOD CAUSE. ACCORDINGLY, THE COURT ORDERS DEPONENT TO APPEAR AND PRODUCE THE DOCUMENTS CALLED FOR BY THE SUBPOENA OF MARCH 14, 2019.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)
